utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five items are present. Each is fully specified with details and costs. Health coverage includes description and monthly cost; property coverage includes description and cost; travel coverage includes description and cost; additional_services includes details and setup fee; total_budget includes monthly and annual totals. All required details are present and aligned with the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan includes three main policy types: health_coverage (LifeFirst Standard Plan), property_coverage (unnamed but matches LifeFirst Standard Coverage based on description), and travel_coverage (matches LifeFirst Standard Plan). The LifeFirst Standard Plan appears in both the 'primary_health_coverage' and 'travel_insurance' sections of the ground-truth data, each having a rating of 8 and 7 respectively. The property coverage description ('Home and contents including electronics...') corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under 'property_protection.home_content', which has a rating of 8. Therefore, the mappings are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (Health) = 8, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (Property) = 8, LifeFirst Standard Plan (Travel) = 7.
